.Lithium columns …
… were obtained by lithium deposition on uniform and dense nucleation sites formed by
regulation of lithium fluoride on protected copper current collectors. In their
Communication on page 14207 ff. Q. Zhang et al. show that the as-obtained ultrathin
columnar lithium anodes contribute to stable cycling in working batteries with dendrite-
free features.
